pom.xml.general_idea: Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to support the new JDK baseline.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Updated the Java version used in the CI environment from JDK 17 to JDK 21.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to Amazon Corretto 21 to align with the Java 21 migration.
